sections.draft_text: The Supplier's Quotation includes pricing on the basis of Fixed Price, Outcome Based T&M (capped at a NTE Price), Time and Materials (T&M) (capped at a NTE Price), and a Combination of T&M and Fixed Price. Detailed pricing information is provided in the attached annexes, ensuring compliance with the tender requirements.

The Supplier accepts the draft contract terms and acknowledges the requirement to complete and submit an AIC Schedule or AIC Plan, as applicable, based on the Work Order value. The Supplier is committed to fulfilling all AIC Obligations as specified by the Commonwealth.

The Supplier provides two case studies demonstrating relevant experience in delivering similar services. These case studies highlight our methodology, past performance, technical merit, and compliance with pricing structures. Detailed case studies are attached in the `case_studies/` directory.

The Supplier employs a robust project management methodology, supported by a governance structure that ensures effective reporting and performance management. Monthly performance reviews will be attended to assess and discuss performance against agreed measures.

The Supplier confirms compliance with all Australian Government requirements, including the absence of any judicial decisions relating to unpaid employee entitlements. A detailed corporate overview is provided, outlining our background, size, and structure.

The proposed solution architecture is designed to meet the requirements of the Work Order, with a focus on managing Intellectual Property in accordance with clause 5 of the COD. Detailed architectural diagrams are included to illustrate the solution.

The Supplier's transition approach ensures a seamless transition-in and transition-out process, with detailed plans provided for each phase. All required plans will be delivered in accordance with the Work Order specifications.
The Supplier's Deed of Undertaking is included as a PDF, duly signed, and all quotations will be lodged electronically via AusTender before the specified Closing Time.
